item.title: FedEx sues for refund after Supreme Court strikes down tariffs
item.description: FedEx has filed a lawsuit seeking a full refund of the money it paid to satisfy President Trump's tariffs, making it the first major company to seek r...

item.title: D.C. Attorney General Brian Schwalb says Congress' attempt to override city's tax law came too late
item.description: The District of Columbia can reject President Trump's tax cut because Congress missed the deadline for disapproving the law, D.C. Attorney General Bri...

item.title: County commissioner in Texas withdraws plan to designate portion of road as Charlie Kirk memorial
item.description: An Austin, Texas-area official who wanted to designate part of Farm to Market Road 969 as a memorial to Charlie Kirk tabled the plans at a meeting Mon...

item.title: From -40 to slushy: How a warming Alaska made the Arctic even more dangerous
item.description: The last day I had in Fairbanks, conditions started to get worse. It warmed up to a balmy 11 degrees and the forecast threatened to approach the freez...
